changelog:
Initial release of Better Sprinting!

**Toggle Sprint:**
- Press sprint key once to toggle (no holding)
- Sprint in all directions (not just forward)
- Disable double-tap sprint option
- Works with vanilla sprint key

**Toggle Sneak:**
- Press sneak key once to toggle
- No holding required
- Works with vanilla sneak key

**Flying Boost:**
- Sprint key boosts flying speed
- Configurable boost (1x to 5x speed)
- Works in creative/spectator mode

**HUD Indicators:**
- Shows [Sprint: ON] when toggled
- Shows [Sneak: ON] when toggled
- Configurable position
- Can be disabled

**Configuration:**
- 10+ config options
- All features toggleable
- Client-side only

**Perfect for:**
- Players tired of holding sprint
- Creative mode building
- Long-distance travel
- PvP movement control
